commands.review_summary:
This PR updates pinned `github/gh-aw-actions` setup/setup-cli references from v0.78.3 to v0.79.8 in three GitHub workflow files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency update PR rather than a bug report. Source and diff inspection verify that current main still has v0.78.3 pins and the PR updates them to v0.79.8.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; there is no actionable patch defect, only workflow evidence and maintainer merge judgment for an automation dependency bump.
